summary: Iteration 16 backend + frontend testing of (a) FEA terminology + fea_equation in /api/healing/fea, (b) POST /api/healing/auto-dampen-wave (with/without auto_execute, no-critical, validation matrix), (c) GET /api/metrics/correlation (shape + window validation + samples-after-traffic + healing-action annotations), and full UI flows for ConversionFunnelCorrelationChart, FEATerminologyCard, and FEATopologyHeatMap (chaos toggle, auto-arrest toggle, fea-node-API click, fea-dampener-summary, fea-toggle-dampened-view, fea-dampen-now manual flow). All 22 backend pytest cases pass against the public preview URL: terminology dict has 10 pairs (stress σ, von_mises σvm, strain ε, stiffness K, yield σy, displacement u, load F, energy E, potential Φ, cascade_risk) with fea_equation 'K · u = F → σ = K · ε → σvm = …'; auto-dampen-wave with source=DB returns wave_arrested=true, cut_edge {Queue→Backend, cascade_risk=1.0}, recommended_action {circuit_breaker, target=Backend, rationale}, wave_metrics {baseline_peak_downstream, dampened_peak_downstream, arrest_percentage, t_arrest_seconds}, baseline+dampened timelines, auto_executed=false, execution_result=null when auto_execute=false; with auto_execute=true (after iterating across DB/API/Cache/Queue/Backend sources to dodge 30-90s per-action cooldowns) auto_executed=true and execution_result {success=true, sri_before, sri_after, sri_delta} populated; fault_strength=0.01 + threshold=0.95 yields wave_arrested=false, reason='no_critical_arrivals', recommended_action=null; all 7 invalid-input variants (granularity=bogus, steps∈{0,500}, fault_strength∈{0,1.5}, critical_arrival_threshold∈{0.0,1.0}) return 400; /api/metrics/correlation returns the full required schema, rejects window_seconds=29 and 3601 with 400, after 35s of /api/products traffic samples>3 and the auto-executed action_id appears in annotations with {action_id, sri_before, sri_after, sri_delta, t_relative, target_node}; regression endpoints (topology/schema, fault-propagation, resilience-debt, trend with non_recoverable, admin/webhooks/status with admin login, auth/login, products) all 200. Frontend Playwright run validates: admin login → dashboard → System Health tab; conv-correlation-chart, fea-terminology-card, resilience-debt-card, fea-heatmap all render; pearson-r='0.792'; conv-window-1800 click triggers GET /api/metrics/correlation?window_seconds=1800; FEATerminologyCard exposes 10 fea-term-* items including stress/strain/stiffness/yield/displacement/von_mises; chaos and auto-arrest toggles flip labels to 'Chaos: ON' / 'Auto-Arrest: ON'; with both ON, clicking fea-node-API fires 1 POST fault-propagation + 1 POST auto-dampen-wave and renders fea-dampener-summary ('Wave arrested — path cut via circuit_breaker on Backend, cut edge: Queue→Backend, cascade_risk: 100%'); conv-annotations-list renders ⚡ circuit_breaker / api_error_suppression / queue_drain / connection_pool_reset entries; fea-toggle-dampened-view flips label 'Show: Dampened' ↔ 'Show: Baseline'; with auto-arrest OFF a fresh node click fires 0 auto-dampen calls and the manual fea-dampen-now button then triggers exactly 1 POST /api/healing/auto-dampen-wave and re-renders the summary panel.

issues: fea-dampener-summary shows 'peak (base): 0.493' and 'peak (damp): 0.493' (i.e. 0% arrest displayed) for some auto-arrest runs even though wave_arrested=true — the displayed metric uses critical-arrival peak instead of mid-path peak so visually the dampening looks ineffective. Consider showing baseline_peak_downstream vs dampened_peak_downstream from wave_metrics for a clearer 'X% arrested' KPI.

Toast message reads 'Wave arrested 0% at Queue→Backend' which is misleading when the cut edge IS the critical-arrival edge (peak unchanged at the directly-attacked node). Suggest computing arrest_pct against the worst non-source non-cut-target node, or hiding the % when it equals 0.
Recharts width(-1)/height(-1) console warnings still present on initial mount (pre-existing, unrelated to iteration 16).

action_items: Consider fixing the misleading 'Wave arrested 0%' toast / summary on auto-arrest runs (cosmetic; metric source should be wave_metrics.arrest_percentage computed against non-source downstream peak, not the critical-arrival peak which IS the cut edge target).

auto_dampen_wave's auto_executed flag silently turns False when the mapped healing action is in cooldown — frontend currently treats that as a hard failure. Consider returning a structured 'cooldown_remaining_seconds' field so the UI can show 'Action queued — circuit_breaker cooling down 42s'.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 4502 lines — split overdue. Recommend backend/healing/correlation.py (CorrelationTracker), backend/healing/dampening.py (auto_dampen_wave + _simulate_with_cut), backend/routes/healing.py for FastAPI routes.

auto_dampen_wave validation lives in the route handler (manual if/raise HTTPException) instead of Pydantic Field constraints. Move to Field(gt=0, le=1) / Field(ge=1, le=200) on AutoDampenWaveRequest so FastAPI emits structured 422 responses (would be a contract change — current tests assert 400).

auto_dampen_wave catches generic Exception around execute_action and stores {error: str(e)} but the success path stores {success, sri_before, sri_after, sri_delta}. The cooldown branch returns success=False with sri_*=None — UI cannot distinguish cooldown vs other failure. Pass through a discriminator field.

CorrelationTracker.snapshot interpretation has hard-coded thresholds 0.5 / 0.2 — extract to settings so prod can tune. Also pearson_r is computed only when std>1e-9 on BOTH series; if conversion is flat (single value over the window) it returns 0.0 silently which the UI shows as 'weak coupling' — should return None and a clearer message.

Healing action cooldowns (30-90s) are global per-process and not exposed to /api/healing/auto-dampen-wave callers. Auto-arrest mode can fail silently and mislead operators. Surface cooldown_until in execution_result.

ConversionFunnelCorrelationChart fetches both window_300 and window_1800 from the same component but on toggle re-renders it does NOT debounce — clicking 30m then 5m back in quick succession fires both requests; consider AbortController.

FEATopologyHeatMap dampener summary computes peak (base/damp) from baseline.node_summary[best_target] which IS the cut-edge endpoint, so visually it always shows identical peaks. Reconsider which node's peak to display.
test_credentials: admin@freshcart.com / admin123 (source: /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Cookie auth via httpOnly access_token (verified on /api/admin/webhooks/status admin-only route).
seed_data_creation: None permanent. test_correlation_populated_after_traffic_and_action drives ~70-200 GET /api/products requests over ~35s to populate CorrelationTracker (samples are kept in-memory, max 600, transient).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iteration16_dampen_correlation.py -v` (~3min total — includes the 35s traffic burst + retry budget for cooldown-affected auto-execute test). For frontend: login admin@freshcart.com → click 'System Health' tab → assert conv-correlation-chart, fea-terminology-card, resilience-debt-card, fea-heatmap render. Click conv-window-1800 → expect GET /api/metrics/correlation?window_seconds=1800. Toggle fea-chaos-toggle and fea-auto-arrest-toggle (labels flip to 'Chaos: ON' / 'Auto-Arrest: ON'), click fea-node-API → 1 POST /api/healing/fault-propagation + 1 POST /api/healing/auto-dampen-wave with auto_execute=true; fea-dampener-summary appears, fea-toggle-dampened-view toggles label. With auto-arrest OFF, click node → 0 auto-dampen calls; click fea-dampen-now → 1 auto-dampen call + summary. Iteration 13/14/15 regressions all green.
rca of the issue: N/A — all 22 backend tests pass, all 13 frontend spec items verified. The only initial backend-test failures (3) were resolved by: (1) /api/admin/webhooks/status requires admin auth — added Session.post(/api/auth/login) before GET, (2) the auto_execute=true test was hitting per-action cooldowns from the adaptive_healer — fix iterates source∈{DB,API,Cache,Queue,Backend} which maps to different healing actions until one not in cooldown is found. The cooldown contract is otherwise intact and observable on the manual route.
